rationale: Keep: the cited paper is strongly thematically and methodologically aligned, modeling dynamic advertising–WOM interdependence and time-varying effectiveness, while the citing paper explicitly studies dynamic interdependence of traditional and social earned media with sales. Given the citing note’s stated extension of prior WOM/publicity research and the exact DOI match (10.1509/jmr.07.0441), this is plausibly a substantive theory/method foundation rather than an incidental mention.
